tsTroubleshooting.domains: (topic tsTroubleshooting) (topic hi-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic ut-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic sw-d) (topic ui-d) (topic oce-d) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c tsTroubleshooting oceTroubleshooting-c)
tsTroubleshooting.title: 11 Operator panel information is scaled/screen is black

tsSymptoms.p: The user interface is a multi touch screen. By touching the screen at multiple locations and making a gesture the screen can scale, zoom in. This can also be caused by cleaning action of the user interface.

tsCauses.p: Cleaning of the user interface, the screen can consider this as a multi touch action.
Prevent cleaning oft the screen in the keep healthy or the standby mode. The user interface is blacked out and not responding to multi touch gestures.

li.p: Put 2 fingers in the upper left corner and 2 in the lower right corners. Swipe the fingers towards each other.
This might not resolve the issue on the first try. It also depends on how well the finger tips are detected by the user interface.
If not solved: do a reboot of the system.
If needed: Instruct the key operator.
